name: Ashes
short_description: Chaos and devastation devoured the last sparkles of life. Surviving is the main task.
detailed_description:
It's time to test.
Surviving is the main task.

This is author's project was created especially for funs of survival.

● Unique game mechanics.
● Upgrade of your Shelter (no limit).
● Creation and upgrade of weapons (no limit).
● Life indicators (health, thirst, hunger).
● Confrontation with Infected.
● Collecting resources.
● English and Russian language.
● Opportunity to start a new game with a record of days gone by.
● Training for young survivors.
